creator: mph@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

Port upgraded, thanks.  Changes as follows: 
- MAINTAINER left as ve@sci.fi after receiving email from him indicating 
that he has NOT relinquished ownership.  Please do not change this 
field without permission from the listed individual (except for 
"unowned" ports maintained by ports@freebsd.org). 
- The only field in the header comments that needed changing was 
"Version required".  Your modifications provide history, but the CVS 
version control system that we use already provides that to interested 
parties.
